name: 法玛斯 | 黑水
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been painted in an aquatic-stripe pattern with charcoal metallic paints of various reflectivities over a chrome base coat. Water gives life, but it can also take it...
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器以铬为外表，配上水栖条纹图案，然后使用拥有不同反射率的木炭金属涂料进行了涂装。 水能载舟，亦能覆舟…
